footer.tagline: Your AI intern for SMEs — no risk, guaranteed results.

howItWorks.title: Your AI intern in three steps

problemsSolutions.title: Do any of these sound familiar?

godfatherOffer.heading: How we work
godfatherOffer.intro: We never take on more than 2 new clients per quarter — so we can focus entirely on your business. If you reach out now, you get:

step1.title: 30 minutes free
step1.description: A no-obligation conversation where we analyse your biggest repetitive process. No sales pitch, just honest advice.

step2.title: 2-week pilot
step2.description: We build a working AI solution for your process. You see the results firsthand — before making any decision.

step3.title: No-cure-no-pay
step3.description: You only pay when the time saving is demonstrable. No result, no invoice. No exceptions.

kostenbesparing.title: Direct savings on labour costs
kostenbesparing.description: Tasks currently done by staff or a VA are handled by the AI intern. Hours × hourly rate — every week.

tijdswinst.title: Hours freed up for work that actually matters
tijdswinst.description: Repetitive processes drop off the agenda. The reclaimed time goes toward clients, purchasing, and growth.

omzet.title: Products online that are currently invisible
omzet.description: Every product page that isn't live is a sale you never see. The AI intern keeps your catalogue up to date.

godfatherOffer.ctaSub: Max. 2 clients per quarter — no commitment, no obligations

noCureNoPay.title: You only pay when it works

proposition.heading: No risk. No upfront investment. Just results.
proposition.point2: You define the success criteria together with us
proposition.point3: Pay only after verified, measurable results

story.heading: Our story
story.paragraph1: AIntern was founded with one mission: give every SME their own dedicated AI intern — one that knows your business, runs your internal processes, and works like an extra employee without the overhead.
story.paragraph2: We develop your AI intern from scratch: analysing your processes, identifying where AI adds real value, and building a solution that fits exactly how you work. You only pay when results are verified.

vision.heading: Our vision
vision.text: Every SME deserves their own AI intern — built to know your business, not anyone else's.

contact.heading: Ready to start?
contact.subtext: Book a free intro call. We'll analyse your situation and show you exactly what your AI intern can do.
